attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.GROUP_MEMBER_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.PERSON_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.DELETE_FLAG, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS,
 (
 select GROUP_MEMBER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS
 minus
 select GROUP_MEMBER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.GROUP_MEMBER_ID = STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.GROUP_MEMBER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_JTF_RS_GROUP_MEMBERS)
